name: Shooter Ammo
description: Creates a fixed baseline for shooter ammo in the New Ranged package. Tier 1–3 base shooters usually have 4 shots, tier 4–6 base shooters usually have 5 shots, most upgrades gain +1 shot, Titan has 7 shots, and Ballista is reduced to 16 shots. Archery can increase total ammo pool during combat.
author: bew_
